title: helianthemum apenninum subsp. cantabricum
intro: Helianthemum apenninum subsp. cantabricum, also known as Cantabrian rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the rockrose family (Cistaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum apenninum subsp. cantabricum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried flowers being used for herbal preparations.
